case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. SAGIAO, DAVIS C. et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SAGIAO, DAVIS C. SAGIAO, LUCIA F. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 35 SANTOS ST, SF, CA $2,120.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,120.00, LEASE FORFEITED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DAVIS, MATTHEW DAVID SUBSTITUTED FOR CLARKE, KEVIN MICHAEL AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAGIAO, DAVIS C. SAGIAO, LUCIA F. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 35 SANTOS ST, SF, CA $2,120.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,120.00, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E ON EVICTION PROVIDED DEFTS PAY $400 BY 5PM 21-JUL-95; $365 BY 5PM 4-AUG-95; $365 BY 5PM 18-AUG-95; $365 BY 5PM EVERY OTHER FRIDAY UNTIL ALL PAST DUE RENT IS PAID IN FULL S/E LIFTED IF DEFTS DEFAULTS IN PAYMENT. DEFTS GIVEN 24 HRS NOTICE. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS,COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SERVED SEP-14-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAGIAO, DAVIS C. SAGIAO, LUCIA F. DOES 1 TO 10
